steps.title: Find the linear equation
steps.content: From the table, two points are $(0,46)$ and $(3,34)$. Their slope is $$\frac{34-46}{3-0}=-4$$So the line is $y=-4x+46$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Enter the table points and the line $y=-4x+46$. The equivalent standard-form equation is $24x+6y=276$. The answer is B.
